title: selaginella apoda
intro: Selaginella apoda, also known as Spiny Club Moss, is a type of rare and ancient plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella apoda include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Selaginella apoda typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat various health conditions.
